channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish all over street needs clearing asap, 3rd April
item.description:
Rubbish bags next to bin have been ripped up and food waste and litter is all over street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Hindmans Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Pallets dumped by tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Box and rubbish dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Box and rubbish dumped in street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Household rubbish dumped, 3rd April
item.description:
Household rubbish including toaster, bin dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken water meter cover really dangerous, 3rd April
item.description:
Broken water meter cover outside no 49 chelsfield road needs fixing urgently. Deep hole someone’s going to break and ankle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Chelsfield Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter outside charity shop near Lees barber, 3rd April
item.description:
Please can you collect litter from the charity shop at end of parade nest Lees Barber. I don’t know why but the refuge litter collected seem to bypass the end of this parade? Also lots of tar chippings on pavement bus your patch up work in Pickford Lane near children’s spa shop and residential housing? Do you sweep after fixing the roads? Or ever sweep pavements?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public Litter Bins are full, 3rd April
item.description:
The two public litter bins are full again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on Restell Close, 3rd April
item.description:
There are a couple of potholes on the top of Restell Close
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Restell Close, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 3rd April
item.description:
Dumped car no road tax

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 3rd April
item.description:
Sofa and mattress dumped on green.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palewell Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.description:
Drain rattling outside the bakery in Pickford lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London

item.title: Overgrown trees, 3rd April
item.description:
Pathway is becoming smaller because of overgrown trees.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Street, Edmonton

item.title: Litter bin overflow and other rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
This bin is missed for more than a month and more rubbish and waste is dumped around and on it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned rubbish, 3rd April
item.description:
Abandoned rubbish and it looks like animals are spreading the filth

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drains under bridge on Thicket Road, 3rd April
item.description:
Drain blocked under the bridge down Thicket Road nearby the park. Please can these be cleared. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling offence, 3rd April
item.description:
Asked nicely to do the necessary, refused. This person lives at 126 Christchurch Way part of the Enderby Wharf development. I also live at this development

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cable Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign and Bin box, 3rd April
item.description:
Englefield Path, Orpington vandalised by spray painting on street sign and blue bin box near.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Englefield Path, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on street box with red spray paint on Stockwell road., 3rd April
item.description:
Graffiti has been sprayed on a street box on Stockwell road SW9. The graffiti is in red spray paint. Unfortunately there is more noticeable graffiti as you approach Stockwell underground station both on the walls and shop fronts. The graffiti has recently been put there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 3rd April
item.description:
Fly Tipping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
